hook.text: UNITED DERBY NIGHT AT THE WORLD CUP

beats.text: CUNHA AND CASEMIRO'S BRAZIL FACE MAZRAOUI'S MOROCCO
THREE UNITED PLAYERS IN THE SAME WC GROUP
BRAZIL VS MOROCCO KICKS OFF AT 11PM BST
MCTOMINAY'S SCOTLAND FACE HAITI AT 2AM TOO

caption: United Derby Night at the World Cup! 🔴⚽ Cunha and Casemiro's Brazil face Mazraoui's Morocco in Group C tonight (11pm BST, MetLife Stadium). Then McTominay's Scotland vs Haiti at 2am. Three United connections in the same WC group. Who are you backing? 🔴
